externalSource.authority: Alcohol and Tobacco Tax and Trade Bureau
externalSource.privacyReview: This is a repository-generated downscale of the already privacy-screened M Cellars OCR-benchmark artwork; no new content is introduced. The same certificate form fields, applicant-contact blocks, signatures, qualification text, and footer content excluded from the parent remain excluded here. No excluded content is stored in the repository.
externalSource.publicRecordLimitations: The TTB Public COLA Registry exposes approved-label information located by TTB ID. The exact original design-source file and applicant-contact data are not part of this repository. This derivative is a downscale of a committed repository derivative, not the original design source.
externalSource.availabilityCaveat: Byte-for-byte regeneration is verified on the development environment only; libvips/PNG-encoder versions may differ across machines. The committed asset's recorded identity is authoritative for tests.

transformationSteps.description: Deterministic fixed-width downscale (targetWidth 601, cubic kernel, PNG compressionLevel 9) of the committed, privacy-screened parent derivative tests/fixtures/precheck/m-cellars-24205001000905/label-ocr-source.jpeg (sha256 0b0ccec13bf6c533ec7928b017b140a0213fb4555812fea81d71872adb453713). Produced by scripts/fixtures/generate-lowres-derivative.mjs. No cropping, no added noise, no manual pixel or text correction.

derivatives.intendedUse: Low-resolution degraded derivative for measuring extraction behavior on reduced-resolution evidence. Disabled for real-OCR regression pending a determinism-safe evaluation harness.

provenanceNotes.artifactVerifiedTruth: Generated from committed derivative m-cellars-24205001000905/label-ocr-source.jpeg (sha256 0b0ccec13bf6c533ec7928b017b140a0213fb4555812fea81d71872adb453713) via scripts/fixtures/generate-lowres-derivative.mjs; the external-source parent kind records the ultimate public-record origin, while this note records the exact in-repository parent file.
